ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: [Letter from Costanzo Macio to Camillo Vezzani]
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Inc: `Molto magnifico mio signore, chi vedesse la vostra lettera, ne poi fosse informato del fatto...` expl.: `...le bacio la mano col pregarle ogni contento`
ItacWorkItem.Shelfmark: Harry Ransom Center Ranuzzi MSS Ph 12670
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Macio congratulates with Vezzani, as one of his academicians `un vostro accademico [...] qual si chiama Giorgio Scotto`, received his degree and became knight: `si e` fatto questa mattina dottore et cavaliere insieme`. Macio reminds Vizzani that this person is his cousin. The remain of the letter is a humorous reminder that Macio has been writing to Vezzani on a regular basis.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
